_comment: board-v1 skeleton: 2 lanes x 2 stages. Replace lanes/stages/nodes/edges with your process. Every node needs a unique id + a lane/stage that exists in the lanes/stages arrays. Every edge source/target must reference a real node id. emphasis is one of lead/key/bottleneck/loop/normal (optional, defaults to normal-like styling). Remove this _comment field once you're done -- it's ignored by the renderer either way.
title: Untitled Board
